introSection: Metropolis was a steel roller coaster located at Luna Park in Melbourne, Victoria, Australia. It was dismantled in 2012.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: First known to have been painted blue with white supports. At some point, the track was repainted red.

fullText:
Metropolis was a steel roller coaster located at Luna Park in Melbourne, Victoria, Australia. It was dismantled in 2012.



First known to have been painted blue with white supports. At some point, the track was repainted red.
